promptName: Write Code and add a final comment
description: Generates the code requested in § (e.g. from a comment). §{Language} specifies the language, while §{2} specifies a final comment that should be written down.
systemMessage: Generate the requested §{Language} code. Answer only with the code, without providing any other answer in natural language. At the end of the code, add a comment with this text: §{Final Comment}
